title: GreFusion 9 Inch Strong Paper Plates [125 Pack] Heavy Duty Disposable Plates Sugarcane Eco-Friendly White Party Plates
features: Product information: GreFusion Ultra 9 inch disposable plates x 125 Count.
Disposable paper plates: No Cleanup. Keep your hand clean and made your life easier and convenient.
Eco-friendy paper plates : this material is 100% SUGARCANE FIBER. No trees harmed, just sugar cane leftovers turned into something amazing.

Strong paper plates: Our 9 inch paper plates with Flex-Proof Technologyare are more stronger than standard disposable paper or plastic ones. Perfect size for dinner, from weeknight meals to parties and picnics.
Hot or cold: Microwave Safe, Cut Resistant, and Soak-Proof Shield that can handle anything from salad dressing to burger grease, can be used for hot or cold. They won't break, wobble, bend or soak.
description: Product Description Previous page 100% Compost Disposable Plates Paper plates are extremely convenient as they provide a quick and easy solution for meals. You don't have to waste time washing dishes. After eating, you can easily throw away. Heavy-duty Paper Plates Our plates are sturdy and durable, with good oil-resistant, heat-resistant, and cut-resistant. When you use our plates to handle heavy and dirty meals, you don't need to worry about them breaking. The Right Size for Every Meal Great for meals, snacks, casual get-togethers, outdoor picnics or family events, GreFusion paper plates and bowls ease the clean up so you can focus on food, family, friends and what’s important. Cut-resistant and Microwave safe Our Paper Plates are microwave safe up to +100°C and resistant to any leakage/sagging and can handle anything from salad dressing to burger grease. CHEMICAL-FREE DISPOSABLE PLATES We've taken extra care to make our plates PFAS-free and we do not use any plastic or wax coatings, prioritizing your family's health and the environment's wellbeing. Strong with Flex-Proof Technology Made of 100% sugarcane fiber, high-density hot-press molding, GreFusion paper dinner plates are 2X stronger than the other comparable 9” brand paper plate. Next page Sugarcane is an annual renewable plant , that is used for sugar production. The remains of the sugar cane plant that are left over after the sugar has been extracted are used to make the plates and bowls . Items made from sugar cane are particularly stable and have a smooth, attractive surface. GreFusion Ultra 9 inch disposable plates x 125 Count Grefusion everyday 9 inch plate is the perfect size for dinner, from weeknight meals to parties and picnics.
